reviews.comment:
cuenta con un parque arbolado con juegos para niños y fogones.todo muy lindo.como dato,si no sos socio del aca no te permiten usar los fogones pero si tomar unos mates y que los chicos jueguen.

(Translated by Google)
It has a wooded park with a children's playground and fire pits. It's all very nice. Just so you know, if you're not a member of the club, you're not allowed to use the fire pits, but you can have some mate and let the kids play.
